overview: The Man Clinic specializes in hormone optimization for men, offering testosterone replacement therapy, growth hormone stimulation via Sermorelin, and GLP-1 weight loss services with in-house laboratory testing.
highlights: In-house lab with testosterone results in 20 minutes
Five-minute walk-in injections for established patients (no appointment needed)
Choice of self-administered or clinic-administered therapy
targetAudience: Men over 30 experiencing age-related testosterone decline who seek hormone optimization and anti-aging medicine.
